# Food & Delivery Fraud Prevention

Food and delivery merchants are popular targets for fraud and related scams. Sift secures transactions, accounts, and loyalty programs with identity-level insights so diners can log in, earn rewards, and reorder without friction—and you can deliver standout experiences with every order.

## Fraudsters Eat for Free: Stop Food Delivery Fraud and Scams

![shapes](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%20539%20350'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

With convenient options like mobile ordering, self-service kiosks, and online promotions, businesses that cater to customers’ changing habits are seeing explosive growth. But with that growth and revenue comes a side of risk—and fraudsters are hungry.

$1.22T

Projected revenue in the online food delivery market for 2024.

[\*Source: Statista insights](https://www.statista.com/outlook/dmo/online-food-delivery/worldwide)

54%

Of consumers believe they shouldn’t be liable if their payment information is used for fraud without their knowledge.

[\*Source: Sift](https://javelinstrategy.com/whitepapers/new-account-fraud-threat-down-every-avenue)

## Optimize the Risk-Reward Equation

**Proactively Stop Fraud Losses**. Block fraudsters before the point of transaction, reduce chargebacks, win disputes, and protect your customers automatically.

**Tap into Decisions with Dimension**. Leverage AI-powered solutions and context-driven insights to automatically and accurately block risky transactions, while fast-tracking orders for trusted customers.

**Deliver Seamless Experiences.**. Keep your customers coming back for more. Put an end to false positives, delight diners, and ensure fraud protection doesn’t get in the way of growth with actionable insights.

**Building an internal risk engine?** The Sift Score API adds critical external context to internally-built risk models. Detect global & industry threats with real-time risk scores powered by 1T annual consortium events. Build the way you want, without sacrificing access to the powerful tools in the Sift Console. **[Learn more](https://sift.com/solutions/sift-score-api/)**.

![FoodDelivery\_Solutions Overview Circle@2x](data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%20viewBox='0%200%201188%201050'%3E%3C/svg%3E)

## Get Unstoppable Growth

2.6%

Current food & delivery payment fraud attack rate across the Sift network.

0.04%

Current food & delivery fraudlent chargeback rate across the Sift network

0.25%

Current food & delivery manual review rate across the Sift network.

## Complete Protection and Increased Flexibility

The same factors that drive growth for food and delivery businesses also increase the risk and impact of fraud. With AI-powered decisioning, you’ll be able to protect every step of the user journey and fuel growth, all while improving the experience for legitimate customers and streamlining operations.

## Grow Fearlessly With Sift

Sift’s AI-powered solutions automate your fraud fighting, accurately stopping fraud automatically, and providing intuitive, insightful tools to make manual reviews fast, accurate, and insightful.

1T

Events per year processed by Sift

The Sift data network scores 1 trillion events per year.

700

Customers protected by Sift

Sift’s commitment to long-term customer success empowers more than 700 customers to grow fearlessly.
